prompt: Hook visual: Here's what science actually says about checkpoint inhibitors.
Context visual: Checkpoint inhibitors are a groundbreaking approach in immunotherapy, designed to unleash the body's immune system again
Escalation visual: But how do they work? They block proteins that keep immune cells in check, allowing them to attack tumors more effective
Evidence visual: Research shows promising results, yet many patients don’t respond, raising questions about why some do and others don’t.
